text:
Part 1

Guide
Part 1: Interview.
You will be asked ten (10) questions.
Listen carefully and answer each question.

Speaking time: 20 seconds after each question

Part 2

Guide
Part 2. Reading Aloud.
You will see eight (8) sentences.
Read each sentence aloud.

Speaking time: 10 seconds per sentence

Part 2

Guide
Part 2: Reading Aloud.
You will see eight (8) sentences.
Read each sentence aloud.

Speaking time: 10 seconds per sentence

Question
I have around thirteen meetings every week, but my supervisor usually has twenty.

Part 2

Guide
Part 2: Reading Aloud.
You will see eight (8) sentences.
Read each sentence aloud.

Speaking time: 10 seconds per sentence

Question

Part 2

Guide
Part 2: Reading Aloud.

Read each sentence aloud.

Speaking time: 10 seconds per sentence

Question

Guide
Part 2: Reading Aloud.

Speaking time: 10 seconds per sentence

Question

Part 3

Guide
Part 3: Presentation.
You will talk about a topic.
Give as many details as you can.

Preparation time: 40 seconds
Speaking time: 60 seconds

Part 3

Guide
Part 3: Presentation.
You will talk about a topic.
Give as many details as you can.

Preparation time: 40 seconds
Speaking time: 60 seconds

Question
PRESENTATION TASK:
Talk about the best company you worked for.

You should say:
- where it was
- what you did there
- why you liked to work there

Part 4

ビープ音の後に回答してください

Guide
Part 4: Graphics Presentation.
You will talk about visual information.
Give as many details as you can.

Preparation time: 40 seconds
Speaking time: 60 seconds

Part 4

Preparation time: 40 seconds
Speaking time: 60 seconds

Question

GRAPHICS PRESENTATION TASK:
This graph shows the number of annual passengers using metro systems in Country G and Country H over five years.

Look at the information and talk about the number of annual passengers using metro systems in Country G and Country H from 2014 to 2018.

Annual Passengers Using Metro Systems in Country G and Country H
(in millions)

12
10
8
6
4
2
0
2014      2015      2016      2017      2018

Country G  ■ Country H

Part 5

Guide
Part 5: Communication Activity.
You will have a conversation with someone.
Read the task. Imagine you are in the situation.

Preparation time: 40 seconds
Speaking time: 30 seconds after each audio prompt

Part 5

ビープ音の後に回答してください

Guide
Part 5: Communication Activity.
You will have a conversation with someone.
Read the task. Imagine you are in the situation.

Preparation time: 40 seconds
Speaking time: 30 seconds after each audio prompt

Question
COMMUNICATION ACTIVITY:
The speaker is asking you about employee training.

Please prepare to talk about:
- training attended
- training methods
